description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Removes input color(s) [1, 2, 8]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_ff805c23(I):
    x1 = hmirror(I)
    x2 = vmirror(I)
    x3 = ofcolor(I, ONE)
    x4 = subgrid(x3, x1)
    x5 = subgrid(x3, x2)
    x6 = palette(x4)
    x7 = contained(ONE, x6)
    O = branch(x7, x5, x4)
    return O
